[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 111111111 a
4 110011011 6
5 101100011 5
6 111011111 8
7 101110001 5

01 101110100 5
12 010111111 7
23 111111111 a match 0 1 2 3
34 100010011 4
45 111111101 8
56 111111110 8
67 111100111 7
70 110011111 7

13 011111111 8
24 111010111 7
